name: Agentica OS Surface Matrix
description: Declares the four Agentica OS layers as governance surfaces so Order Samurai can observe and enforce against Execution, Knowledge, Data, and Governance — not just the .claude runtime.

surfaces.notes: Physically relocated Obsidian vault. Authoritative facts/wiki/prompts. Must not hold telemetry or running code.

surfaces.discoverabilityContract: federation of references to canonical runtime homes
surfaces.notes: Symlinks/junctions only. Volatile, may sprawl. Promotion into blessed runtime gated by promotion_policy.json.
Receipts, audit reports, metrics. Read by Governance for drift detection and token-budget enforcement.
The enforcement engine. Config changes require the human-gated amendment path; agents may propose but not self-apply.

boundaryInvariants: Knowledge holds what is true; Data holds what happened; Governance holds what is allowed; Execution does the work.
A log/receipt/metric in Knowledge is misfiled (-> Data).
A policy change under Governance/Order Samurai/config without human approval is a constitutional violation.
Execution must not write into Knowledge except via an explicit distillation step.
knownGaps: No token/cost metric emitted into Data/metrics — needed for the token-optimization goal.
Sword dependency-audit verifier is declared but not yet executable (secret-scan via verify_secrets.py is live).
